claim: R13-A: cubic residualization (FIXED A=6, dps=2000, N=[50,250], N_ref=400) yields Spearman rho(log|j|, residual_mean) = -0.2034 on n=50 cubic families (Bonferroni p = 0.47, K=3)
R13-A: cubic Spearman rho(log|j|, residual_at_max_n=N=250) = +0.5487 (Bonferroni p = 0.000111)
R13-A: cubic Spearman rho(log|j|, delta_R13_free) = -0.5683 (Bonferroni p = 5.01e-05); compare R1.1 headline rho = -0.6906 (n=50, R1.1 reported 4-param fit at smaller window).
R13-B: quartic residualization (FIXED A=8, same window) yields Spearman rho(log|j|, residual_mean) = -0.0402 on n=60 quartic families (Bonferroni p = 1, K=3)
R13-B: quartic Spearman rho(log|j|, residual_at_max_n=N=250) = -0.0729 (Bonferroni p = 1)
R13-B: quartic Spearman rho(log|j|, delta_R13_free) = +0.0732 (Bonferroni p = 1); compare R1.2 headline rho = +0.073
R13-A: residual_std on cubic catalogue: median = 1.281e-03, max = 9.689e-02; ratio std/|mean| > 0.5 in 50/50 families (noise gate)
R13-B: residual_std on quartic catalogue: median = 1.284e-03, max = 1.319e-03; ratio std/|mean| > 0.5 in 60/60 families (noise gate)
